items.name: Sae Head (Football Style)
items.description:
🌸 Channel your calm intensity with this smooth pink hair inspired by Sae! Designed for avatars that radiate confidence, precision, and cool-headed control. A perfect choice for anime fans, football strategists, and characters with an elite, composed vibe.

🎮 Compatible with R6 and R15 avatars
🧩 Pairs perfectly with cool, elegant, anime, or sporty outfits
🌟 Perfect for styles: anime, football, clean, cool, tactical, minimalistic
